study: SG-WF-004 taddhita residue — enlarged -in/-ika/-ya adjudication via PWG immediate von-base (TAD2-04)
root_inventory: WhitneyRoots/crosswalk/roots.csv (855 canonical dhātus) — NOT the contaminated etymology_stats/dhatu_roots.txt
method: adjudicate the full MW-adjectival base-attested -in/-ika/-ya set against PWG's explicit 'von {#base#}' note: nominal base → taddhita, Whitney-root base → kṛt (immediate base, no ultimate-root contamination)

hand_crosscheck.coverage_bias_note: PWG-silent lemmas skew kṛt while PWG-noted skew taddhita → PWG preferentially documents DENOMINAL derivations; the PWG-noted precision is a high-precision floor, NOT the full-set precision.

interpretation.ika: confirmed clean at ~6× the hand N (hand 8/8 → PWG ~98%)
interpretation.in_ya: PWG-noted subset ~66-69% taddhita is BIASED (PWG under-documents deverbals); full-set precision stays ~25-31% per the hand sample — vindicated, not overturned
interpretation.floor: PWG independently confirms a large citation-backed taddhita floor per suffix
